{{Infobox character
| name = Zeth Baker
| aliases = Zeth
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pattern Construction]], uses a Pattern to overlay reality}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Worldweaver}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Zeth Baker is a specialized Worldweaver who was widely regarded as talented even within his own community. Despite his reputation, he views his abilities as highly specific rather than naturally gifted. During a mission involving the Tanakite camp, Zeth utilized his ability to navigate patrols by posing as an unknown member of their order. To bolster his disguise, he stole a scarlet cloth featuring the symbol of [[Mul’Tanak]] to wear as a scarf. While moving through the camp, he displayed significant determination and attempted to mask his internal fears with a facade of certainty. Zeth has worked alongside [[Brani]], a [[Twin Messenger]], and has expressed a desire to ensure she receives proper honor. His experiences have included physical trauma, such as a severe eye injury, and moments of inexplicable healing where his wounds vanished while he was positioned against a bookshelf.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Zeth Baker is a highly talented Worldweaver. He utilizes the specialized ability of [[Pattern Construction]] to perform his craft. By employing a [[Pattern]], he is able to overlay reality with his power.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Zeth is a Worldweaver.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Zeth's full name is [[Zeth Baker]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Zeth Baker]] is a talented Worldweaver.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Zeth uses a [[Pattern]] to overlay reality.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Zeth possesses [[Pattern Construction]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
